description: Legal notes. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100–1138 CE). One side: Something involving Shemarya b. Yosef al-Iq[rīṭishī?] and his wife Malīḥa (cf. T-S NS 323.27 (PGPID 25606)). The other side: Something involving half of a small house (duwayra) and 'the rights of his wife.'
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
